assertions.assertion: Uses context.AddRequestedClaims for scope-filtered claims like 'department'
assertions.rationale: Does not use AddRequestedClaims at all. Uses context.IssuedClaims.AddRange for all claims indiscriminately.

assertions.assertion: Uses context.IssuedClaims.Add (not AddRequestedClaims) for the mandatory tenant_id claim to bypass scope filtering
assertions.rationale: While it does use IssuedClaims.AddRange, it adds ALL claims this way including department — there is no distinction between mandatory and scope-filtered claims.

assertions.assertion: Implements IsActiveAsync to check whether the user is still active
assertions.rationale: IsActiveAsync exists but is hardcoded to true — it does not actually check whether the user is still active.

assertions.assertion: Registers the profile service with AddProfileService<T>() on the IdentityServer builder
